sentences.arabic: لِلْجَارِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ حُقُوقٌ كَثِيرَةٌ أَوْصَى بِهَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَصِيَّةً مُؤَكَّدَةً.
sentences.translation: Komšija u islamu ima brojna prava na koja je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, snažno upozorio.
sentences.translationEn: A neighbour in Islam has many rights, upon which the Prophet, peace be upon him, gave emphatic guidance.

sentences.arabic: فَعَنْ عَائِشَةَ وَابْنِ عُمَرَ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُمْ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ: «مَا زَالَ جِبْرِيلُ يُوصِينِي بِالْجَارِ حَتَّى ظَنَنْتُ أَنَّهُ سَيُوَرِّثُهُ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ].
sentences.translation: Aiša i Ibn Omer, radijallahu anhum, prenose da je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao: 'Džibril mi je neprestano nalagao lijepo postupanje s komšijom, tako da sam pomislio da će ga učiniti nasljednikom.'
sentences.translationEn: Aisha and Ibn Umar, may Allah be pleased with them, report that the Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Jibreel kept advising me about the neighbour until I thought he would make him an heir.'

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ حُقُوقِ الْجَارِ: كَفُّ الْأَذَى عَنْهُ، وَمُسَاعَدَتُهُ عِنْدَ الْحَاجَةِ، وَعِيَادَتُهُ إِذَا مَرِضَ، وَتَهْنِئَتُهُ فِي أَفْرَاحِهِ وَتَعْزِيَتُهُ فِي مَصَائِبِهِ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi ga Buhari u Knjizi lijepog ponašanja.] Komšijina prava uključuju: kloniti se nanošenja štete njemu, pomagati ga u nevolji, posjetiti ga kada oboli, čestitati mu radosne prilike i sućutiti mu u nevoljama.
sentences.translationEn: [Recorded by al-Bukhari in the Book of Good Manners.] Among a neighbour's rights are: refraining from harming them, assisting them in need, visiting them when they are ill, and congratulating them in joy and consoling them in hardship.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَقْتَصِرُ حُسْنُ الْجِوَارِ عَلَى مَنْ يَجَاوِرُكَ فِي الْمَسْكَنِ، بَلْ يَمْتَدُّ لِيَشْمَلَ الزَّمِيلَ فِي الْعَمَلِ وَالرَّفِيقَ فِي السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Dobro komšijstvo nije ograničeno samo na onoga ko ti je susjed u stambenoj zgradi, već se proteže i na kolegu na poslu i suputnika na putu.
sentences.translationEn: Good neighbourliness is not limited to those who live adjacent to you but extends to the colleague at work and the companion in travel.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنَ الْمُؤْسِفِ أَنَّ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ الْيَوْمَ لَا يَعْرِفُونَ أَسْمَاءَ جِيرَانِهِمْ وَلَا أَحْوَالَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Žalosno je što mnogi muslimani danas ne znaju ni imena ni prilike svojih komšija.
sentences.translationEn: It is regrettable that many Muslims today do not know the names or circumstances of their neighbours.

sentences.arabic: وَلِذَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُحْيِيَ هَذِهِ الشَّعِيرَةَ فِي حَيَاتِهِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ، لِأَنَّ حُسْنَ الْجِوَارِ يَعْكِسُ أَخْلَاقَ الْإِسْلَامِ وَيُقَوِّي أَوَاصِرَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْمُسْلِمِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga je muslimanu obaveza da oživljava ovaj šerijatski propis u svakodnevnom životu, jer dobro komšijstvo odražava islamski moral i jača veze muslimanskog društva.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is incumbent upon the Muslim to revive this practice in their daily life, for good neighbourliness reflects Islamic character and strengthens the bonds of Muslim society.
